title: rainbow`s 3D Mace
description: Tired of boring 2D mace? Rainbow's 3D Mace adds a heavy, realistic model that shines in combat!
body: **Check out my other resource packs!** [![rainbow`s 3D Trident](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r6fvlh3S/277c6abd5f000a9d49a2beeb71be2eed1cd30e0b_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rainbows-3d-trident) **Rainbow's 3D Mace brings the new weapon to life with a custom 3D model!** **This resource pack is allowed to be used in modpacks.** ## 📥 Installation Drop into resource packs folder and activate in-game. ## ✨ Features: - Stunning 3D mace in first-person (hand) and third-person view - Keeps 3D icon in inventory/GUI/frame/shelf - 100% vanilla-friendly, no mods required - Supports Minecraft 1.21.11>! - ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab0562619ee3dac82495f914c937091812df6d0c.png) ## **Preview shaders: Complementary Unbound** **Gallery shows it in action! Feedback welcome. <3**
